name: Instagram Auto Post - Image + Caption + Hashtags

nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs daily. You can also switch to a Manual Trigger for testing.

nodes.name: Set Topic & Style
nodes.notes: Configure your content topic, image style, and brand voice here.

nodes.name: Generate Image (DALL-E 3)
nodes.notes: Generates a 1024x1024 image via OpenAI DALL-E 3. Requires OPENAI_API_KEY in HTTP Header Auth.

nodes.name: Generate Caption & Hashtags (GPT)
nodes.notes: Uses GPT-4o to generate an Instagram caption and hashtags. Same OpenAI API key.

nodes.name: Merge Image + Caption
nodes.notes: Combines the generated image URL and caption/hashtags into a single payload.

nodes.name: IG: Create Media Container
nodes.notes: Step 1 of IG publish: creates a media container. Needs INSTAGRAM_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID and FACEBOOK_PAGE_ACCESS_TOKEN env vars.

nodes.name: IG: Publish Post
nodes.notes: Step 2 of IG publish: publishes the container. This posts to your Instagram feed.

nodes.name: Post Result
nodes.notes: Final output with the Instagram post ID and details.

nodes.name: Manual Trigger (Test)
nodes.notes: Use this for manual test runs instead of the schedule.
